title: 8en's bare bones pvp  texter pack
description: This is a pvp over lay for bare bones.
body:
this is a bare bones pvp add on u will need the original bare bones texter pack and it should work on any 1.20 version.

Features:

low fire

short swords and axes 

low shield and totem 

see how much power your bow or cross bow has

collared webs

new pvp crosshair

see through crystals

see when u have a carved pumpkin on your head

new Textures for the ender paerl,totem,axolotl bucket,blue axolotl,all mine carts.


Why use this texter pack?

this texter pack is made for pvp so no extra stuff like eating animation and stuff like that (other than a few things like the blue axolotl) and it is for pvp sweats and pvp kits like sword,smp,axe and crystal and yes it will work on low end computers.
